properties.areaDesc: Bayamon, PR; Guaynabo, PR; Toa Alta, PR
properties.headline: Flood Advisory issued March 24 at 9:40PM AST until March 25 at 12:00AM AST by NWS San Juan PR
properties.description:
* WHAT...Urban and small stream flooding caused by excessive
rainfall continues.

* WHERE...Bayamon, Guaynabo and Toa Alta.

* WHEN...Until midnight AST tonight.

* IMPACTS...Water over roadways. Ponding of water in urban or other
areas is occurring or is imminent.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...
- At 940 PM AST, Doppler radar indicated heavy rain. This will
cause urban and small stream flooding. Between 2 and 4 inches
of rain have fallen.
- Additional rainfall amounts up to 1 inch are expected over
the area. This additional rain will result in minor flooding.
properties.instruction:
Turn around, don't drown when encountering flooded roads. Most flood
deaths occur in vehicles.

Be especially cautious at night when it is harder to recognize the
dangers of flooding.

NWSheadline: FLOOD ADVISORY NOW IN EFFECT UNTIL MIDNIGHT AST TONIGHT

properties.headline: Flood Advisory issued March 24 at 9:29PM AST until March 24 at 11:30PM AST by NWS San Juan PR
properties.description:
* WHAT...Flooding caused by excessive rainfall is expected.

* WHERE...Corozal and Morovis.

* WHEN...Until 1130 PM AST.

* IMPACTS...Water over roadways.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...
- At 928 PM AST, Doppler radar indicated heavy rain due to
thunderstorms. Minor flooding is ongoing or expected to begin
shortly in the advisory area. Between 1 and 3 inches of rain
have fallen.
- Additional rainfall amounts up to 1 inch are expected over
the area. This additional rain will result in minor flooding.
- Some locations that will experience flooding include...
Morovis, Corozal, Franquez and Barahona.
properties.instruction:
Be especially cautious at night when it is harder to recognize the
dangers of flooding.

NWSheadline: FLOOD ADVISORY IN EFFECT UNTIL 1130 PM AST THIS EVENING

properties.areaDesc: Canovanas, PR; Carolina, PR; Rio Grande, PR; Trujillo Alto, PR
properties.headline: Flood Advisory issued March 24 at 7:40PM AST until March 24 at 10:45PM AST by NWS San Juan PR
properties.description:
* WHAT...Urban and small stream flooding caused by excessive
rainfall is expected.

* WHERE...Canovanas, Carolina, Rio Grande and Trujillo Alto.

* WHEN...Until 1045 PM AST.

* IMPACTS...Minor flooding in low-lying and poor drainage areas.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...
- At 740 PM AST, Doppler radar indicated heavy rain due to
thunderstorms. This will cause urban and small stream
flooding. Between 1 and 2.5 inches of rain have fallen.
- Additional rainfall amounts up to 1 inch are expected over
the area. This additional rain will result in minor flooding.
properties.instruction:
Be especially cautious at night when it is harder to recognize the
dangers of flooding.

NWSheadline: FLOOD ADVISORY IN EFFECT UNTIL 1045 PM AST THIS EVENING
